description: Religious subject matter carrying the title "Shabbat Tushfa[?]" redemption of Shabbat – undated – Bassatine Cemetery – Museum of Islamic Art – (number 94) – in Hebrew. ((information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa, ed., Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 41). MCD.
